evidence_stage.final_test_basis: Final MECH-057 adjudication requires integrated behavioral evidence with responsibility-bearing intervention traces, not toy proxy runs alone.
evidence_stage.proxy_interpretation: Current MECH-057 probes are proxy mechanistic pressure tests and should not be read as final ethical-agency verdicts.

items.rationale: MECH-059 (precision.confidence_channel_separate_from_prediction_error) is active with retain_ree adjudication but all prior evidence was synthetic (ree-v2/ree-experiments-lab, archived 2026-02-26). Mechanistic prediction needs genuine ree-v1-minimal validation.
items.experiment_description: Probe whether the confidence channel (precision alpha_k) in ree-v1-minimal E3 selector produces signals independent of prediction error PE. Measure correlation between alpha_k and PE across diverse rollout conditions.
items.synthetic_evidence_note: All 38 prior runs (jepa_uncertainty_channels, claim_probe_mech_059) are synthetic. Do not use as baseline.

items.rationale: MECH-060 (commitment.dual_error_channels_pre_post_commit) is candidate with pending_design. All 137 prior runs were synthetic. Requires REE-native design before genuine experiment.
items.experiment_description: First: complete pure REE design for pre-commit (simulation) vs post-commit (realized) error routing in ree-v1-minimal trainer. Then probe that cross-channel leakage rate stays below 0.05 and post-commit attribution gain exceeds 0.3.
items.synthetic_evidence_note: All 137 prior runs (commit_dual_error_channels) are synthetic (source_repo.name: ree-v2). Do not use as baseline.

items.rationale: MECH-056 (residue.trajectory_first_placement) is candidate with hybridize adjudication. All 42 prior runs (trajectory_integrity) were synthetic.
items.experiment_description: Test whether residue R is placed at trajectory positions (pre-commit) rather than only at final action positions. Ablate trajectory-first placement and measure downstream ethical constraint accuracy.
items.synthetic_evidence_note: All prior trajectory_integrity runs are synthetic (ree-v2/ree-experiments-lab). Confidence 0.766 is unreliable.

items.rationale: MECH-058 reframed as latent_stack.e1_e2_timescale_separation. Prior 156 runs from synthetic sources. Genuine experiment needed on real E1 (LSTM slow horizon) vs E2 (fast rollout) separation in ree-v1-minimal.
items.experiment_description: Ablate E1/E2 timescale separation in ree-v1-minimal: compare (a) both using same timescale, (b) E1 slow + E2 fast (canonical), (c) E1 fast + E2 slow. Measure latent prediction stability and harm reduction.
items.synthetic_evidence_note: All 156 prior runs (jepa_anchor_ablation, claim_probe_mech_058) are synthetic. Subject renamed from JEPA framing to REE-native.

items.rationale: MECH-061 (commitment.boundary_token_error_reclassification) promoted to active via retain_ree adjudication. Prior 8 runs were synthetic. Mechanistic validation needed.
items.experiment_description: Test whether commitment boundary tokens correctly reclassify pre-commit errors as post-commit in ree-v1-minimal. Measure commitment reversal rate and error attribution accuracy across scenarios.

items.rationale: MECH-057 (agentic_extension.control_completion_requirement) is candidate with hybridize adjudication. Prior 10 runs synthetic. May need conceptual redesign given JEPA decoupling.
items.experiment_description: Design experiment for control completion requirement in agentic extension scenarios. Determine what REE-native control completion means given JEPA decoupling.
items.synthetic_evidence_note: All 10 prior runs (claim_probe_mech_057) are synthetic. Confidence 0.525 is unreliable. Conceptual redesign may be needed.
items.design_note: Requires clarification of agentic extension semantics without JEPA substrate. Consider splitting from JEPA-dependent framing.
